raw_text:
Real estate purchase mortgage loans
Acba bank provides Mortgage Loans to individuals who have a stable income. Loans are provided for the acquisition (purchase) of real estate (apartment, house, cottage, etc.).
Business card
Currency: AMD, foreign currency
Minimum amount: 1,000,000 AMD or its equivalent in foreign currency
Duration of credit: 12- 240 months
Annual interest rate: Fixed annual interest rate.
AMD՝ 13.5-14.5%, USD` 10.5-11.5%, Eur 9-10%
Annual floating interest rate.
Fixed years՝ 3՝
AMD՝ 13-13.5%, USD՝ 9.5-10%, Eur՝ 8.5%
Fixed years՝ 5՝
AMD՝ 13.5-13.9%, USD՝ 10.5-11.5%, Eur՝ 9-10%
Maximum amount: 500,000,000 AMD or its equivalent in foreign currency
Surety: Purchased real estate, other real estate if necessary, movable estate, money, guaranties, etc.
Tab: Advantages
Provision of credit
to both residents and non-residents,
without analyzing the client's income, in case of making an advance payment of 50% or more (freezing the amount), if the property is purchased from the primary market,
without additional property collateral if the property is purchased from a cooperating developer;
without advance payment in case of mortgage of additional immovable property,
without the
Borrower
/co-
Borrower
's life insurance requirement,
without monthly loan service commission and loan application review fee
Tab: Terms and conditions
Duration
Minimum duration - 12 months
Maximum duration - 240 months.
Annual interest rate (fixed - untill 60 months)
Currency
Annuanl interest rate
AMD
13.75-14.5%
USD

Euro

If the loan / collateral ratio exceeds 80%, the nominal interest rate of the loan will be added, and in case of a floating interest rate, 0.2% will be added to the fixed component. *
* This calculation does not include funds pledged by the Developer.
Attention:
The nominal interest rate of mortgage loans with a floating rate can be changed by the financial institution no more than twice annually.
The maximum rate of nominal interest rate of mortgage loans with a floating rate is set at higher/lower +/- 4% from the fixed interest rate.
Loan repayments
– at monthly installments or at installments of the loan principal, envisaging partial repayments of the interest amounts and loan for each month.
Other repayment schedule of interest amount and loan principal may be set, if necessary.
Prepayment
– Minimum prepayment is set at the minimum of 10% of the value of the purchased real estate.
The prepayment may not be required, if additional real estate property is pledge.
Collateral
- purchased real estate, if necessary collateral can also be other real estate, movable property, cash, guarantees, etc.
Fee
- 1% of the loan amount
Interest calculation
- daily on the loan reducing balance;
Loan-collateral ratio
- 100%.
More information:
Changing component of floating interest rate of mortgage loans
Possible additional payments:
Loan tariffs
Previous terms of loan tariffs
Tab: State support programs
The state support programs are:
Regional mortgage assistance program
Mortgage Repayment Assistance Program
Tab: Refund from income tax
How to receive a refund for paid interest amounts for the mortgage loan for purchase of real estate from the income tax
This information is of an advisory nature
We will help you, in accordance with the RA Tax Code, receive compensation for interest payments on your mortgage loan from your income tax.
Income tax of individuals who are hired employees is refunded in the amount of paid interest amounts of the mortgage loan, if:
The mortgage loan was provided for the purpose of an apartment or a private residential house or for building of an individual residential house in the territory of the Republic of Armenia and was actually directed towards the fulfillment of the above mentioned goals.
Apartment shall be acquired:
Immediately from the constructor in the multi-apartment building, built or under construction, in the Republic of Armenia;
From the state or community, within the framework of the state and/or community housing program, implemented by the state or community; in this case, a parking lot may also be purchased in conjunction with the apartment, if it is attached to the apartment in accordance with the procedure, established by the Government of the Republic of Armenia.
Private residential house shall be acquired:
.
Directly from the constructor, being an organization or individual entrepreneur, in residential districts or complexes in the Republic of Armenia.
What are the restrictions for receiving a refund?
The
contractual value of the transaction
to acquire an apartment shall not exceed
55 mln AMD
(this provision does not apply to loans provided for the purpose of building a private residential house),
The
total amount of income tax, subject to refund,
for each quarter may not exceed
1.5 mln AMD (from 01.01.25: AMD 750,000),
After January 1, 2018, the borrowers and co-borrowers can only make use of the option of refund of the income tax
only for one mortgage loan
of their choice.
What is required to receive a refund:
Submit the following documents to the territorial subdivision of the Tax Office of a built or under construction multi-apartment residential building or private house:
Loan package (original copy of sale and mortgage loan, of property, being an additional collateral (if any), main loan agreement, appendixes to the main loan agreement, or copies of these agreements, verified by the notary, and ownership certificates of the pledged property and property, being the additional collateral, or certificate of state registration of the right to purchase real estate from the building under construction),
Certificate, provided by the constructor, on the acquisition of the apartment or private residential house directly from the constructor, or permission to build a private residential house to the borrower (within the timeframe established by the legislation of the Republic of Armenia);
Identification document of the borrower/co-borrower;
Public service number or certificate on not having a public service number.
To compensate for the interest paid every quarter, please submit an electronic application on the official website of the State Revenue of the Republic of Armenia. Include the bank account number of the individual receiving the compensation.
Attention: The application may be rejected, if at the moment of its submission, the tax liabilities, declared on the salary and other payments, equaled to it, based on a monthly (simplified) calculation of income tax and social payments, presented for the months of the reporting quarter, are not fully fulfilled.
These terms apply in case of mortgage loans, issued after January 1, 2018.
Tab: Credit vacation
During the loan period (if the loan is already valid in the Bank for 6 months) the customer can approach the branch և apply for a credit leave.
Credit leave is offered in the following cases:
The client (borrower / co-borrower) is on maternity leave or
The client (borrower / co-borrower) is on child care leave
only once during the loan period
up to 6 months
Only accrued interest is repaid during the holidays
The customer can use the Credit Vacation if he has made the payments on the given loan properly.
Tab: To recieve a loan
Required documents
Identification document of the applicant;
Public service number or a license of non-receipt of public service number
Certificate of ownership of the real estate to be purchased (copy);
Identification document (copy) of the co-owners of the real estate to be purchased and copies of their marriage certificates (if married);
Reference from the passport department on the persons registered in the purchased apartment, residential house, cottage;
Reference from the applicant's employer about the average monthly income received by the applicant (calculated over the last 12 months);
Document(s) proving ownership of the property offered as a collateral (copy).
The issue date of the documents at the time of acceptance shall not exceed 15 days.
Depending on the circumstances, additional documents and information may be required.
* Reference shall include the customer's monthly net salary/income after taxes, work address, phone numbers, signature and stamp of the referring organization manager, outgoing date of issue.
Tab: Useful information
The decision on the loan application is made and the customer is notified within maximum 6 banking days after the customer submits the required documents;
In case of a positive decision on loan provision, it is registered within maximum 2 banking days after the end of the pledging process;
Loan account statement (including copy) and other information during the agreement validity is provided free of charge.
Annual actual interest rate.

Example of calculation of loan interest amount:
Loan amount - 20,000,000 AMD
Loan interest rate – 12.5 % (floating)
Loan period - 240 months
Fee - 1%
In this example the monthly repayment amount * will be 227,228 AMD
Annual actual interest rate will be 13.93%
Daily interest amount will be Loan Amount (Balance) x Loan Rate ÷ 365 = (20,000,000×12.5%÷365) = 6,849.30 AMD
*Repayment size may differ based on the number of days in the given month.
In case of foreign currency loans, the basis for the calculation of the annual actual interest rate is the exchange rate published on the official website of the Central Bank of Armenia (CBA); the actual annual interest rate may vary depending on the rate of exchange published on the official website of the Central Bank of the Republic of Armenia.
ATTENTION: LOAN INTEREST AMOUNTS ARE CALCULATED BASED ON THE NOMINAL INTEREST RATE, AND THE ANNUAL ACTUAL INTEREST RATE SHOWS HOW MUCH THE LOAN WILL COST FOR YOU, IN CASE OF DUE PAYMENT OF INTEREST AMOUNTS, LOAN PRINCIPAL AMOUNT AND ALL MANDATORY FEES FOR PROVISION AND SERVICE OF LOAN. YOU CAN FIND THE CALCULATION OF ACTUAL INTEREST RATE
HERE
.
Learn more:
Mortgage loan calculator
Failure by the borrower to fulfill its liabilities on time is subject to a fine of 0.13% (
applied fines
) for each overdue day.
The loan repayment is performed in the following sequence (in case of repaying overdue liabilities):
Fine/penalty
Interest amount
Principal amount.
Insurance companies, cooperating with the Bank, are:
Rosgosstrakh-Armenia
(address: 1 Northern ave., Yerevan, tel.: (374) 10 59 10 10)
Ingo Armenia
(address: 51, 53 Hanrapetutyan str., areas 47, 48, 50, Yerevan, tel.: (374) 10 59 21 21)
Nairi Insurance
(address: 10 Vazgen Sargsyan str., area 110, Yerevan 0010, tel.: (374) 60 50 00 60)
Qualified independent valuation companies, cooperating with the Bank
Informational bulletin of mortgage loan for acquisition (purchase) of mortgage loan
Tab: Important to know
Mortgage loans for purchase of real estate are provided to resident or non-resident individuals over 18 years of age, who will not reach the pension age +4 years during the loan validity.
Mortgage loans for purchase of real estate are provided for the acquisition of real estate for primary or secondary markets.
Loan is provided in a non-cash form;
Factors for a positive loan decision are customer credit rating;
Factors for rejection of loan: insufficient financial performance as a result of the analysis, bad credit history of the customer, insufficiency/lack of required collateral, professional opinion of the Business Advisor, professional opinion of the Credit Committee;
The loan is registered in the Bank's branches;
During the loan validity, insurance is made for the borrower(s) against accidents, as well as purchased real estate, being the security for the loan, on an annual basis. Insurance is carried out at the residual amount of the loan through an insurance company, acceptable to the borrower and on terms, acceptable to the creditor;
The valuation of the pledged real estate is carried out by a qualified independent valuator, cooperating with the Bank;
In case of loans in foreign currency, the changes in exchange rates may have an impact on loan repayments;
Collateral agreements, being security for mortgage loans, shall by verified by the notary, and the pledge right, arising from these agreements, is subject to state registration;
The Bank is obliged to provide the consumer with a contract proposal 7 days in advance and allow 7 days for consideration;
The bank statements during the agreement validity are provided 20 business days before each repayment, specified by the schedule, in the communication method, preferred by the customer;
Upon request, provision of loan information in a format of a reference during the business day of submission of application – 5000 AMD, during the following business days – 3000 AMD.
YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO COMMUNICATE WITH YOUR FINANCIAL ORGANIZATION IN YOUR PREFERRED METHOD - BY MAIL OR EMAIL. RECEIPT OF INFORMATION ELECTRONICALY IS THE MOST CONVENIENT. IT IS AVAILABLE 24/7, FREE OF THE RISK OF LOSS OF PAPER INFORMATION AND PROVIDES CONFIDENTIALITY.
The Bank may unilaterally change the contractual interest rate by notifying the Borrower at least 7 calendar days in case of non-purposeful use of the loan, as well as failure to fulfill the obligations set forth in the loan agreement.
ATTENTION: APPLYING FOR A LOAN, THE BANK WILL PROVIDE YOU, YOUR GUARANTORS (IF AVAILABLE) WITH AN INDIVIDUAL SHEET OF SIGNIFICANT TERMS OF MORTGAGE LOAN, WHERE THE INDIVIDUAL TERMS OF LOAN, PROVIDED TO YOU, WILL BE PRESENTED.
For lending, the following payments may be made by the consumer:
Real estate valuation fee – 5,000 AMD or more, depending on the property surface and type
Notary service fee - 3,000 - 15,000 AMD
Fee for registration of certificate of real estate collateral right - 2,000-25,000 AMD
Joint reference (on real estate restrictions) fee - 10,000 AMD
Property and accident insurance payments - 0.15% or 0.16% of loan residual value.
The evaluated amount of purchased property is the insurance amount of the real estate, being the collateral.
Fees, related to pledge of other property - 2,000-10,000 AM.
All payments are included in the actual interest rate calculation.
The loan can be repaid (fully or partially) earlier than the contract term, in which case the customer pays the interest amount, calculated for the actual loan term, as well as a lump sum penalty in the following size:
In case of early repayment during the first year - 0.6% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year;
In case of early repayment during the second year - 0.4% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year;
• In case of early repayment during the third year - 0.2% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year, and in case of early repayment during the remaining period of the contract, no penalty will be charged.
Contractual year is considered to be each period of 12 months, following the agreement date.
Confiscation of collateral
THE PLEDGED PROPERTY CAN BE CONFISCATED, IF THE BORROWER DOES NOT DULY REPAY THE INTEREST AMOUNTS AND LOAN AMOUNT. IF THE COLLATERAL VALUE IS INSUFFICIENT, THE BORROWER’S LIABILITIES WILL BE REPAID AT THE EXPENSE OF OTHER PROPERTY OF THE BORROWER.
Information, provided to the Credit Registry
INFORMATION ABOUT THE LOAN WILL BE REGISTERED IN THE CREDIT REGISTRY, IF THE BORROWER FAILS TO DULY REPAY THE INTERST AMOUNT AND LOAN AMOUNT.
HAVING A NEGATIVE CREDIT HISTORY MAY BE AN OBSTACLE FOR YOU TO RECEIVE ANOTHER LOAN IN THE FUTURE.
FOR GUARANTORS
Please be informed that:
If the borrower fails to perform their liabilities, you will pay for it instead, your credit history will be impaired, and your property will be confiscated.
You will be provided with the copies of the loan agreement, guarantee agreement and repayment schedule.
The communication will be performed in the way, preferred by you.
You will be notified 7 days in advance of a change in the terms of the contract.
A reminder of the current liability will be sent to you 1 day in advance.
In case of delay of loan repayment, you will be notified at the latest one day later.
THE GUARANTOR HAS THE RIGHT TO:
Request from the creditor the information on the loan balance at any time.
Receive the money, paid by you for the loan, from the borrower, as well as other losses incurred by you instead of the borrower.
Financial assistant
fininfo.am
ATTENTION: "YOUR FINANCIAL DIRECTORY" IS THE ELECTRONIC SYSTEM FOR SEARCH, COMPARISON OF SERVICES, OFFERED TO INDIVIDUALS, AND MAKING THE SELECTION OF THE MOST EFFICIENT OPTIONS FOR YOU EASIER.
CTA links
acba digital: https://www.acbadigital.am
Fill in the form: https://www.acba.am/hy/online-applications/Credit-applications/purchase-loans
Calculator: https://www.acba.am/en/calculators/loan-calculator/purchase-mortgage-calculator
Last updated: In case of any discrepancies in the information contained in the Site, as well as inaccurate texts in a foreign language, please be guided by the Armenian version. 19.01.2026 11:07

tabs.title: Refund from income tax
tabs.content_html:
How to receive a refund for paid interest amounts for the mortgage loan for purchase of real estate from the income tax

This information is of an advisory nature


We will help you, in accordance with the RA Tax Code, receive compensation for interest payments on your mortgage loan from your income tax.

Income tax of individuals who are hired employees is refunded in the amount of paid interest amounts of the mortgage loan, if:

The mortgage loan was provided for the purpose of an apartment or a private residential house or for building of an individual residential house in the territory of the Republic of Armenia and was actually directed towards the fulfillment of the above mentioned goals.

  • Apartment shall be acquired:

Immediately from the constructor in the multi-apartment building, built or under construction, in the Republic of Armenia;

From the state or community, within the framework of the state and/or community housing program, implemented by the state or community; in this case, a parking lot may also be purchased in conjunction with the apartment, if it is attached to the apartment in accordance with the procedure, established by the Government of the Republic of Armenia.

  • Private residential house shall be acquired:.

Directly from the constructor, being an organization or individual entrepreneur, in residential districts or complexes in the Republic of Armenia.


What are the restrictions for receiving a refund?

  • The contractual value of the transaction to acquire an apartment shall not exceed 55 mln AMD (this provision does not apply to loans provided for the purpose of building a private residential house),
  • The total amount of income tax, subject to refund, for each quarter may not exceed 1.5 mln AMD (from 01.01.25: AMD 750,000),
  • After January 1, 2018, the borrowers and co-borrowers can only make use of the option of refund of the income tax only for one mortgage loan of their choice.

What is required to receive a refund:

  • Submit the following documents to the territorial subdivision of the Tax Office of a built or under construction multi-apartment residential building or private house:
    • Loan package (original copy of sale and mortgage loan, of property, being an additional collateral (if any), main loan agreement, appendixes to the main loan agreement, or copies of these agreements, verified by the notary, and ownership certificates of the pledged property and property, being the additional collateral, or certificate of state registration of the right to purchase real estate from the building under construction),
    • Certificate, provided by the constructor, on the acquisition of the apartment or private residential house directly from the constructor, or permission to build a private residential house to the borrower (within the timeframe established by the legislation of the Republic of Armenia);
    • Identification document of the borrower/co-borrower;
    • Public service number or certificate on not having a public service number.

  • To compensate for the interest paid every quarter, please submit an electronic application on the official website of the State Revenue of the Republic of Armenia. Include the bank account number of the individual receiving the compensation.

Attention: The application may be rejected, if at the moment of its submission, the tax liabilities, declared on the salary and other payments, equaled to it, based on a monthly (simplified) calculation of income tax and social payments, presented for the months of the reporting quarter, are not fully fulfilled.

These terms apply in case of mortgage loans, issued after January 1, 2018.

These terms apply in case of mortgage loans, issued after January 1, 2018.

tabs.title: Credit vacation
tabs.content_html:
During the loan period (if the loan is already valid in the Bank for 6 months) the customer can approach the branch և apply for a credit leave.

Credit leave is offered in the following cases:

  1. The client (borrower / co-borrower) is on maternity leave or
  2. The client (borrower / co-borrower) is on child care leave
  • only once during the loan period
  • up to 6 months
  • Only accrued interest is repaid during the holidays

The customer can use the Credit Vacation if he has made the payments on the given loan properly.

tabs.title: To recieve a loan
tabs.content_html:
Required documents

  • Identification document of the applicant;
  • Public service number or a license of non-receipt of public service number
  • Certificate of ownership of the real estate to be purchased (copy);
  • Identification document (copy) of the co-owners of the real estate to be purchased and copies of their marriage certificates (if married);
  • Reference from the passport department on the persons registered in the purchased apartment, residential house, cottage;
  • Reference from the applicant's employer about the average monthly income received by the applicant (calculated over the last 12 months);
  • Document(s) proving ownership of the property offered as a collateral (copy).

The issue date of the documents at the time of acceptance shall not exceed 15 days.

Depending on the circumstances, additional documents and information may be required.

* Reference shall include the customer's monthly net salary/income after taxes, work address, phone numbers, signature and stamp of the referring organization manager, outgoing date of issue.

tabs.title: Useful information
tabs.content_html:
• The decision on the loan application is made and the customer is notified within maximum 6 banking days after the customer submits the required documents;
  • In case of a positive decision on loan provision, it is registered within maximum 2 banking days after the end of the pledging process;
  • Loan account statement (including copy) and other information during the agreement validity is provided free of charge.

Example of calculation of loan interest amount:

  • Loan amount - 20,000,000 AMD
  • Loan interest rate – 12.5 % (floating)
  • Loan period - 240 months
  • Fee - 1%
  • In this example the monthly repayment amount * will be 227,228 AMD
  • Annual actual interest rate will be 13.93%
  • Daily interest amount will be Loan Amount (Balance) x Loan Rate ÷ 365 = (20,000,000×12.5%÷365) = 6,849.30 AMD


*Repayment size may differ based on the number of days in the given month.


In case of foreign currency loans, the basis for the calculation of the annual actual interest rate is the exchange rate published on the official website of the Central Bank of Armenia (CBA); the actual annual interest rate may vary depending on the rate of exchange published on the official website of the Central Bank of the Republic of Armenia.


ATTENTION: LOAN INTEREST AMOUNTS ARE CALCULATED BASED ON THE NOMINAL INTEREST RATE, AND THE ANNUAL ACTUAL INTEREST RATE SHOWS HOW MUCH THE LOAN WILL COST FOR YOU, IN CASE OF DUE PAYMENT OF INTEREST AMOUNTS, LOAN PRINCIPAL AMOUNT AND ALL MANDATORY FEES FOR PROVISION AND SERVICE OF LOAN. YOU CAN FIND THE CALCULATION OF ACTUAL INTEREST RATE HERE.


Learn more:

Mortgage loan calculator

Failure by the borrower to fulfill its liabilities on time is subject to a fine of 0.13% (applied fines) for each overdue day.

The loan repayment is performed in the following sequence (in case of repaying overdue liabilities):

  • Fine/penalty
  • Interest amount
  • Principal amount.

Qualified independent valuation companies, cooperating with the Bank

tabs.title: Important to know
tabs.content_html:
Mortgage loans for purchase of real estate are provided to resident or non-resident individuals over 18 years of age, who will not reach the pension age +4 years during the loan validity.

Mortgage loans for purchase of real estate are provided for the acquisition of real estate for primary or secondary markets.

  • Loan is provided in a non-cash form;
  • Factors for a positive loan decision are customer credit rating;
  • Factors for rejection of loan: insufficient financial performance as a result of the analysis, bad credit history of the customer, insufficiency/lack of required collateral, professional opinion of the Business Advisor, professional opinion of the Credit Committee;
  • The loan is registered in the Bank's branches;
  • During the loan validity, insurance is made for the borrower(s) against accidents, as well as purchased real estate, being the security for the loan, on an annual basis. Insurance is carried out at the residual amount of the loan through an insurance company, acceptable to the borrower and on terms, acceptable to the creditor;
  • The valuation of the pledged real estate is carried out by a qualified independent valuator, cooperating with the Bank;
  • In case of loans in foreign currency, the changes in exchange rates may have an impact on loan repayments;
  • Collateral agreements, being security for mortgage loans, shall by verified by the notary, and the pledge right, arising from these agreements, is subject to state registration;
  • The Bank is obliged to provide the consumer with a contract proposal 7 days in advance and allow 7 days for consideration;
  • The bank statements during the agreement validity are provided 20 business days before each repayment, specified by the schedule, in the communication method, preferred by the customer;
  • Upon request, provision of loan information in a format of a reference during the business day of submission of application – 5000 AMD, during the following business days – 3000 AMD.

YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO COMMUNICATE WITH YOUR FINANCIAL ORGANIZATION IN YOUR PREFERRED METHOD - BY MAIL OR EMAIL. RECEIPT OF INFORMATION ELECTRONICALY IS THE MOST CONVENIENT. IT IS AVAILABLE 24/7, FREE OF THE RISK OF LOSS OF PAPER INFORMATION AND PROVIDES CONFIDENTIALITY.


The Bank may unilaterally change the contractual interest rate by notifying the Borrower at least 7 calendar days in case of non-purposeful use of the loan, as well as failure to fulfill the obligations set forth in the loan agreement.


ATTENTION: APPLYING FOR A LOAN, THE BANK WILL PROVIDE YOU, YOUR GUARANTORS (IF AVAILABLE) WITH AN INDIVIDUAL SHEET OF SIGNIFICANT TERMS OF MORTGAGE LOAN, WHERE THE INDIVIDUAL TERMS OF LOAN, PROVIDED TO YOU, WILL BE PRESENTED.

For lending, the following payments may be made by the consumer:

  • Real estate valuation fee – 5,000 AMD or more, depending on the property surface and type
  • Notary service fee - 3,000 - 15,000 AMD
  • Fee for registration of certificate of real estate collateral right - 2,000-25,000 AMD
  • Joint reference (on real estate restrictions) fee - 10,000 AMD
  • Property and accident insurance payments - 0.15% or 0.16% of loan residual value.

The evaluated amount of purchased property is the insurance amount of the real estate, being the collateral.

  • Fees, related to pledge of other property - 2,000-10,000 AM.

All payments are included in the actual interest rate calculation.

The loan can be repaid (fully or partially) earlier than the contract term, in which case the customer pays the interest amount, calculated for the actual loan term, as well as a lump sum penalty in the following size:

  • In case of early repayment during the first year - 0.6% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year;
  • In case of early repayment during the second year - 0.4% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year;
  • • In case of early repayment during the third year - 0.2% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year, and in case of early repayment during the remaining period of the contract, no penalty will be charged.

Contractual year is considered to be each period of 12 months, following the agreement date.


Confiscation of collateral

THE PLEDGED PROPERTY CAN BE CONFISCATED, IF THE BORROWER DOES NOT DULY REPAY THE INTEREST AMOUNTS AND LOAN AMOUNT. IF THE COLLATERAL VALUE IS INSUFFICIENT, THE BORROWER’S LIABILITIES WILL BE REPAID AT THE EXPENSE OF OTHER PROPERTY OF THE BORROWER.


Information, provided to the Credit Registry

INFORMATION ABOUT THE LOAN WILL BE REGISTERED IN THE CREDIT REGISTRY, IF THE BORROWER FAILS TO DULY REPAY THE INTERST AMOUNT AND LOAN AMOUNT.

HAVING A NEGATIVE CREDIT HISTORY MAY BE AN OBSTACLE FOR YOU TO RECEIVE ANOTHER LOAN IN THE FUTURE.


FOR GUARANTORS


Please be informed that:

  • If the borrower fails to perform their liabilities, you will pay for it instead, your credit history will be impaired, and your property will be confiscated.
  • You will be provided with the copies of the loan agreement, guarantee agreement and repayment schedule.
  • The communication will be performed in the way, preferred by you.
  • You will be notified 7 days in advance of a change in the terms of the contract.
  • A reminder of the current liability will be sent to you 1 day in advance.
  • In case of delay of loan repayment, you will be notified at the latest one day later.

THE GUARANTOR HAS THE RIGHT TO:

  • Request from the creditor the information on the loan balance at any time.
  • Receive the money, paid by you for the loan, from the borrower, as well as other losses incurred by you instead of the borrower.


Financial assistant

fininfo.am


ATTENTION: "YOUR FINANCIAL DIRECTORY" IS THE ELECTRONIC SYSTEM FOR SEARCH, COMPARISON OF SERVICES, OFFERED TO INDIVIDUALS, AND MAKING THE SELECTION OF THE MOST EFFICIENT OPTIONS FOR YOU EASIER.

• In case of early repayment during the third year - 0.2% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year, and in case of early repayment during the remaining period of the contract, no penalty will be charged.
